Part.Source:
&DataFim = &Data + 31 &SdtFluxo.Clear() &SdoAtu = 0 For each Order EmpCod,CtaBanSts Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where CtaBanSts = Status_AtivoInativo.ATIVO
For each Order EmpCod,CtabanCod,(SdoDta) Where SdoDta < &Data &SdoAtu += SdoAtu Exit EndFor EndFor
For each Order EmpCod,CreRecPag,CreVlrSdo,CreDtaVct //contas Receber - ANTERIORES Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where CreRecPag = ReceberPagar.Receber Where CreVlrSdo > 0 Where CreSts <> Status_Duplicata.CANCELADA Where CreDtaVct < &Data // Where CreTipDup = TipoDuplicata.Duplicata &auxData = &Data-1 &RecCreVlrSdo += CreVlrSdo EndFor
For each Order EmpCod,CreRecPag,CreVlrSdo,CreDtaVct //contas pagar - ANTERIORES Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where CreRecPag = ReceberPagar.Pagar Where CreVlrSdo > 0 Where CreSts <> Status_Duplicata.CANCELADA Where CreDtaVct < &Data &auxData = &Data-1 &PagCreVlrSdo += CreVlrSdo EndFor do 'Sdtanterior'
//###################################################################################################### For each Order EmpCod,CreRecPag,CreVlrSdo,CreDtaVct //contas Receber Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where CreRecPag = ReceberPagar.Receber Where CreVlrSdo > 0 Where CreSts <> Status_Duplicata.CANCELADA Where CreDtaVct >= &Data and CreDtaVct <= &DataFim &auxData = CreDtaVct &CreVlrSdo = CreVlrSdo Do 'carregaSdtReceber' EndFor
//##################################################################### For each Order EmpCod,CreRecPag,CreVlrSdo,CreDtaVct //contas Pagar Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where CreRecPag = ReceberPagar.Pagar Where CreVlrSdo > 0 Where CreSts <> Status_Duplicata.CANCELADA Where CreDtaVct >= &Data and CreDtaVct <= &DataFim &auxData = CreDtaVct &CreVlrSdo = CreVlrSdo Do 'carregaSdtPagar' EndFor
//##################################################################### For each Order EmpCod,CreRecPag,CreVlrSdo,CreDtaVct //contas Pagar - Pago Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where CreRecPag = ReceberPagar.Pagar Where CreSts <> Status_Duplicata.CANCELADA Where CrePagDta >= &Data and CrePagDta <= &DataFim &auxData = CrePagDta &CreVlrSdo = CrePagVlr Do 'carregaSdtPago' EndFor
For each Order EmpCod,CreRecPag,CreVlrSdo,CreDtaVct //contas Pagar - Recebido Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where CreRecPag = ReceberPagar.Receber Where CreSts <> Status_Duplicata.CANCELADA Where CrePagDta >= &Data and CrePagDta <= &DataFim &auxData = CrePagDta &CreVlrSdo = CrePagVlr Do 'carregaSdtRecebido' EndFor
&SdtFluxo.Sort('Data')
For &SdtFluxoItem in &SdtFluxo If &SdtFluxoItem.Data >= &Data &SdtFluxoItem.BanVlrTot = &SdoAtu &SdtFluxoItem.TotGer = &SdoAtu + &SdtFluxoItem.CtaTotal &SdoAtu = &SdoAtu + &SdtFluxoItem.CtaTotal EndIf Endfor
Sub 'carregaSdtReceber' &IsAchou = False
For &SdtFluxoItem in &SdtFluxo If &SdtFluxoItem.Data = &auxData &IsAchou = True &SdtFluxoItem.CtaReceber += &CreVlrSdo &SdtFluxoItem.CtaTotal = (&SdtFluxoItem.CtaReceber - &SdtFluxoItem.CtaPagar) - &SdtFluxoItem.CtaFolPg Exit EndIf EndFor
If &IsAchou = False &SdtFluxoItem = new() &SdtFluxoItem.Data = &auxData &SdtFluxoItem.CtaReceber = &CreVlrSdo &SdtFluxoItem.CtaTotal = (&SdtFluxoItem.CtaReceber - &SdtFluxoItem.CtaPagar) - &SdtFluxoItem.CtaFolPg &SdtFluxo.Add(&SdtFluxoItem) EndIf EndSub
Sub 'carregaSdtPagar' &IsAchou = False For &SdtFluxoItem in &SdtFluxo If &SdtFluxoItem.Data = &auxData &IsAchou = True &SdtFluxoItem.CtaPagar += &CreVlrSdo &SdtFluxoItem.CtaTotal = (&SdtFluxoItem.CtaReceber - &SdtFluxoItem.CtaPagar) - &SdtFluxoItem.CtaFolPg Exit EndIf EndFor
If &IsAchou = False &SdtFluxoItem = new() &SdtFluxoItem.Data = &auxData &SdtFluxoItem.CtaPagar = &CreVlrSdo &SdtFluxoItem.CtaTotal = (&SdtFluxoItem.CtaReceber - &SdtFluxoItem.CtaPagar) - &SdtFluxoItem.CtaFolPg &SdtFluxo.Add(&SdtFluxoItem) EndIf EndSub
Sub 'carregaSdtPago' &IsAchou = False
For &SdtFluxoItem in &SdtFluxo If &SdtFluxoItem.Data = &auxData &IsAchou = True &SdtFluxoItem.MovPago += &CreVlrSdo &SdtFluxoItem.MovTotMov = &SdtFluxoItem.MovReceb - &SdtFluxoItem.MovPago Exit EndIf EndFor
If &IsAchou = False &SdtFluxoItem = new() &SdtFluxoItem.Data = &auxData &SdtFluxoItem.MovPago += &CreVlrSdo &SdtFluxoItem.MovTotMov = &SdtFluxoItem.MovReceb - &SdtFluxoItem.MovPago &SdtFluxo.Add(&SdtFluxoItem) EndIf EndSub
Sub 'carregaSdtRecebido' &IsAchou = False For &SdtFluxoItem in &SdtFluxo If &SdtFluxoItem.Data = &auxData &IsAchou = True &SdtFluxoItem.MovReceb += &CreVlrSdo &SdtFluxoItem.MovTotMov = &SdtFluxoItem.MovReceb - &SdtFluxoItem.MovPago Exit EndIf EndFor
If &IsAchou = False &SdtFluxoItem = new() &SdtFluxoItem.Data = &auxData &SdtFluxoItem.MovReceb += &CreVlrSdo &SdtFluxoItem.MovTotMov = &SdtFluxoItem.MovReceb - &SdtFluxoItem.MovPago &SdtFluxo.Add(&SdtFluxoItem) EndIf EndSub
sub 'Sdtanterior' &SdtFluxoItem = new() &SdtFluxoItem.Data = &auxData &SdtFluxoItem.CtaPagar = &PagCreVlrSdo &SdtFluxoItem.CtaReceber = &RecCreVlrSdo &SdtFluxoItem.CtaTotal = &SdtFluxoItem.CtaReceber - &SdtFluxoItem.CtaPagar &SdtFluxoItem.BanVlrTot = &SdoAtu &SdtFluxoItem.TotGer = &SdoAtu &SdtFluxo.Add(&SdtFluxoItem) EndSub
